message:
chore(engine): sync concurrent agent changes — rustfmt + swarm_control_loop registration

Rustfmt formatting across 10 files (concurrent agent ran cargo fmt):
- ast.rs: Reformat canonical_value map insert, consolidate assert macro args
- benchmark_denominator.rs: Inline assert message on single line
- cancel_mask.rs: Multi-line assert_eq for long determinism message
- controller_interference_guard.rs: Multi-line registration() call
- parser.rs: Break long chain in split_var_declarator_assignment, reformat
  assert_eq for identifier comparison
- policy_controller/service_endpoint_template.rs: Break method chain, multi-line assert
- proof_release_gate.rs: Multi-line decision_id_for() call
- saga_orchestrator.rs: Inline matches! assertion
- scheduler_lane.rs: Multi-line vec! literals and assert messages
- tests/parser_event_ast_equivalence.rs: Multi-line assert_eq for scenario IDs

New module registration:
- lib.rs: Register pub mod swarm_control_loop (added by concurrent agent)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
